roadmap.title: Complete Training Day
roadmap.description: Load Replay Training Day from the Practice menu, finish its opening round, and return to the main menu to register Counter-Strike 2's sole Steam achievement.

achievements.summary: Open @mechanic{Play > Practice > Competitive}, select @mechanic{Replay Training Day}, and finish the opening training round.

guide.context: Counter-Strike 2 has only this one Steam achievement, and Replay Training Day can be loaded in Practice without entering public matchmaking.

steps.text: From the main menu, select @mechanic{Play}, choose @mechanic{Practice}, and set the mode to @mechanic{Competitive}.
Select @mechanic{Replay Training Day} instead of Go, allow the training map to load, and finish its opening round.
Return to the main menu and check Steam for @mechanic{A New Beginning}.
